text: A giraffe is sitting down in a field and eating leaves off a small tree.
A toilet and a sink next to each other.
A skateboarder with both hands on the ground.
A tray of a dozen hotdogs sits on a table
A white and gray passenger plane has just landed or is about to take off.
An old white tiled bathroom with toilet and tub
A person holds up an old flip style cell phone
Old brick building with steeple and clock in a courtyard.
A toilet with the seat up in a bathroom
The top of a boat and some birds flying over it.
